Fields.Name: Attacker: Character ID
Fields.Description: The character ID to define the attacker parameters for.

Fields.Name: Defender: Character ID
Fields.Description: The character ID to define the defender parameters for.

Fields.Name: Allowed Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum distance the throw is allowed to occur at. In metres.

Fields.Name: Angular Difference: Minimum
Fields.Description: The minimum angular difference range between own direction and opponent's direction. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Angular Difference: Maximum
Fields.Description: The maximum angular difference range between own direction and opponent's direction. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Maximum Relative Height
Fields.Description: The throw will not proceed unless the relative distance of the Y-axis from the attacker to the defender is less than this value.

Fields.Name: Minimum Relative Height
Fields.Description: The throw will not proceed unless the relative distance of the Y-axis from the attacker to the defender is above this value.

Fields.Name: Maximum Angular Difference
Fields.Description: The angular difference between the vector in front of the attacker and the vector in the direction from the attacker to the defender. If it is larger than this value, the throw will not proceed.

Fields.Name: Throw Type ID
Fields.Description: The throw type ID for this throw. Linked to the throwTypeId field in the AtkParam.

Fields.Name: Attacker: Animation ID
Fields.Description: The animation ID for the attacker when performing the throw (linked with EzState).

Fields.Name: Defender: Animation ID
Fields.Description: The animation ID for the defender when performing the throw (linked with EzState).

Fields.Name: Throw Escape Resistance
Fields.Description: The amount of 'HP' the throw has. A player can 'resist' the throw, reducing the throw's resistance per escape cycle. If the resistance is lower than 0, the player is released from the throw.

Fields.Name: Throw Escape Cycle Duration
Fields.Description: The duration of the throw escape cycle for the player. This is the interval that the player can reduce the throw's resistance in. In milliseconds.

Fields.Name: Sphere Cast: Upper Radius %
Fields.Description: The ratio of the upper radius when using the sphere cast (this determines if a throw connects).

Fields.Name: Sphere Cast: Lower Radius %
Fields.Description: The ratio of the lower radius when using the sphere cast (this determines if a throw connects).

Fields.Name: Operation Type
Fields.Description: The operation type for the throw.

Fields.Name: Attacker State Type
Fields.Description: The state type in which the attacker may perform the throw.

Fields.Name: Attacker: Attraction Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon used to spawn the sphere cast which determines if a throw connects.

Fields.Name: Defender: Attraction Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon used to spawn the sphere cast which determines if a throw connects.

Fields.Name: Throw Type
Fields.Description: The throw type for this throw.

Fields.Name: Throw Escape Cycle Count
Fields.Description: The number of throw escape cycles a player has during this throw.

Fields.Name: Throw Direction Type
Fields.Description: The direction of the throw hold dummy polygon ID when a throw occurs.

Fields.Name: Attacker can Turn
Fields.Description: If ON, the attacker can turn during the throw.

Fields.Name: Skip Weapon Category Check
Fields.Description: If ON, the attacker's weapon category check is skipped.

Fields.Name: Skip Sphere Cast
Fields.Description: If ON, the sphere cast is skipped.
